name: TopoAgent: A Self-Evolving Topological Agent for Multimodal Scientific Reasoning
summary: arXiv:2607.14658v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in general tasks, rigorous scientific reasoning remains challenging due to the limitations of mo...
description: arXiv:2607.14658v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel in general tasks, rigorous scientific reasoning remains challenging due to the limitations of monolithic, linear planning. Such sequential designs often suffer from visual-semantic misalignment, long-context hallucinations, and brittle execution under fixed task granularity. We propose TopoAgent...
author: Mingze Xu, Yinghui Li, Jiayi Kuang, Zhanhui Kang, Di Yin, Ying Shen, Xing Sun, Yuxing Han
